PVT Enable

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0xc
Size:
0x4
Source:
pvt_rf.rdl

Description

Enables the PVT sensor. Write 1 to start a measurement.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:1] reserved rw 0x0 -
[0] pvt_enable rw 0x0 pvt_enable

Field Descriptions

pvt_enable - pvt_enable

PVT enable. 1=enabled.
